agents.name: meta-orchestrator
agents.description: Coordinates all team agents and ensures comprehensive checks before approval
agents.argument-hint: Run full team review on code changes, PRs, or deployments

handoffs.label: Review Architecture
handoffs.prompt: Review this code for architecture and coding standards compliance

handoffs.label: Check Design Implementation
handoffs.prompt: Audit this implementation against the latest Replit design mockups for pixel-perfect accuracy

handoffs.label: Check Security
handoffs.prompt: Scan dependencies and code for security vulnerabilities

handoffs.label: Validate Compliance
handoffs.prompt: Run compliance and safety checks on this change

agents.name: design
agents.description: Manages Replit design submodule and ensures pixel-perfect UI implementation. See design.agent.md for design system context.
agents.argument-hint: Pull latest designs, implement mockups, or audit UI against design specs

handoffs.label: Update Submodule
handoffs.prompt: Pull the latest changes from the Replit design submodule and update the main repo pointer

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Design audit complete, returning results to orchestrator

agents.name: architecture-standards
agents.description: Enforces architecture and coding standards for quality and maintainability
agents.argument-hint: Review code for standards compliance, readability, and best practices

handoffs.label: Escalate to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Standards review complete, proceeding with full team review

agents.name: brand-voice
agents.description: Reviews user-facing copy and documentation for brand compliance
agents.argument-hint: Check UI copy, documentation, and content for brand voice compliance

agents.name: compliance-safety
agents.description: Enforces product safety, legal, and compliance constraints
agents.argument-hint: Validate compliance, legal requirements, and safety rules

handoffs.label: Escalate to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Compliance review complete, blocking or approving based on findings

agents.name: deployment-topology
agents.description: Manages deployment topology, environment builds, and routing configuration
agents.argument-hint: Validate deployment config, domain routing, and environment setup

handoffs.label: Check Environment Config
handoffs.prompt: Verify environment variables and secrets are correctly configured for this deployment

agents.name: environment-auth
agents.description: Manages environment variables, secrets, and authentication configuration
agents.argument-hint: Validate .env, secrets, and auth provider setup (Clerk, etc.)

handoffs.label: Return to Deployment Agent
handoffs.prompt: Environment configuration validated, returning to deployment review

agents.name: monorepo-boundary
agents.description: Enforces monorepo layout and prevents cross-boundary violations
agents.argument-hint: Check monorepo structure, boundaries, and modularity rules

agents.name: observability-incident
agents.description: Ensures Sentry and observability integration; monitors for incidents
agents.argument-hint: Check Sentry integration, logs, and error reporting

handoffs.label: Escalate Critical Issues
handoffs.prompt: Critical incident detected, escalating to orchestrator for human review

agents.name: plugin-lifecycle
agents.description: Manages plugin inventory, contracts, and feature lifecycle
agents.argument-hint: Review plugin schemas, access policies, and feature lifecycle

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Plugin and feature lifecycle review complete

agents.name: security-dependency
agents.description: Monitors dependencies for vulnerabilities and enforces security practices
agents.argument-hint: Scan dependencies, review code for security issues

handoffs.label: Escalate to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Security and dependency scan complete, blocking or approving based on findings

agents.name: testing-release
agents.description: Runs tests, enforces CI/CD rules, and validates release readiness
agents.argument-hint: Run tests, verify CI/CD pipeline, validate release readiness

handoffs.label: Final Approval
handoffs.prompt: All tests passed, requesting final orchestrator approval for release
